description_long: This object is a DJ controller, specifically a Numark model, designed for audio mixing and music control. It features two large jog wheels on either side, surrounded by numerous physical buttons, knobs, and sliders for manipulating audio tracks. The front panel displays the Numark logo and includes various input/output ports for audio connectivity. The surface is predominantly dark with lighter accents on the jog wheels and control labels, giving it a professional and modern appearance. The device is compact and rectangular, with a slightly raised profile to accommodate the controls and internal electronics. Its construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal components for durability and tactile feedback.
description: A compact Numark DJ controller with dual jog wheels, numerous buttons, and a dark, professional finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both jog wheels, central controls, and the Numark logo with visible input/output ports.
description_view_1: Side perspective highlighting the left jog wheel and the dense array of buttons and knobs on the left side.
description_view_2: Direct front view focusing on the symmetrical layout of the jog wheels, central controls, and the Numark logo.
description_view_3: Side perspective from the right, emphasizing the right jog wheel and the control cluster on that side.
